name: Spring Nicoise Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1 quart water to a boil in a 10-inch skillet.
2. Add the potatoes and cook, covered, for 8 minutes or until almost tender. Then add green beans and cook an additional 5 minutes.
3. Place yogurt and basil in a bowl of blender and whirl for 30 seconds. Set aside.
4. Line four plates with lettuce. Top evenly with potatoes, green beans, onion slices, tuna, and egg slices.
5. Garnish each salad with olives.
6. Drizzle each salad with the yogurt dressing.
